title: Voxel decision aggregation fix via canonical primary_voxel_urn join
description: Replace correlated-subquery reads against voxel_decision_attachments with canonical primary_voxel_urn join against pm_decisions in voxels.routes.ts (3 sites: list line 881, aggregation handler line 942, single voxel line 1062). Aggregation handler getVoxelAggregations SQL rewritten to count decisions via pd.primary_voxel_urn = v.urn — the canonical spatial join shape locked by PR 1.1 (d-2026-06-06-eb-urn-namespace-reconcile). Closes the aggregation half of FU-EB-VOXELIZER-LEVEL-EXTRACTION-FIX-1 (P1) and the decisions-orphaned half of FU-EB-USER-WALK-2026-05-22-VOXEL-WRONG-LEVELS-DECISIONS-ORPHANED-1 (P1) — both remaining preconditions for T5 voxel_groups gate per LUHTECH-EB-TIER1-ROS-OVERLAY-STRATEGY-2026-06-07.

outputs.description: Replace correlated-subquery reads against voxel_decision_attachments with primary_voxel_urn-keyed reads against pm_decisions across the 3 sites in voxels.routes.ts. Site at line 881 (list handler decisionCount), site at line 942 (getVoxelAggregations SUM), site at line 1062 (single voxel handler decisionCount) all rewritten to count rows in pm_decisions WHERE pd.primary_voxel_urn = v.urn. SQL shape preserved (correlated subquery pattern unchanged) — only the table and join column change. No schema changes, no Prisma model edits, no migration. The voxel_decision_attachments table remains in place for curated/typed attachments written by VoxelPersistenceService.attachDecision; this PR decouples aggregation read paths from that table.

outputs.description: New regression test file apps/api-gateway/src/routes/__tests__/voxels.routes.aggregation.spec.ts covering URN-join aggregation behavior. Mocks pg.Pool with controlled query responses. Asserts: (a) decisionCount returned by /voxels/aggregation reflects pm_decisions rows where primary_voxel_urn matches voxel URNs in the project; (b) decisionCount is non-zero when pm_decisions are seeded with primary_voxel_urn populated but voxel_decision_attachments empty (the Stage-6-seeded scenario per DEC-010 Project Intake Pipeline); (c) groupBy='level' and groupBy='system' both function with the new join. Co-located with the existing URN regression test, separate file for clear test boundary.

outputs.description: DEC entry 'd-2026-06-08-aggregation-via-primary-voxel-urn-join' appended to .roadmap/decision-log.json per decision-log.schema.v2.json. Locks the canonical aggregation strategy: voxel-decision aggregation reads count via pd.primary_voxel_urn = v.urn join, NOT via voxel_decision_attachments correlated subquery. Rationale: primary_voxel_urn is the canonical spatial reference (one decision → one primary voxel) populated by Stage 6 intake per DEC-010; voxel_decision_attachments represents curated/typed attachments with attachment_type semantics (LOCATION/SCOPE/IMPACT) populated only by VoxelCoordinationService.routeAndAttachDecision via MCP tool attach_decision_to_voxel. The two tables serve semantically distinct roles; aggregation reads should use the canonical spatial reference. Alternatives considered: (A) fix demo-seed to auto-create attachment rows — rejected as it conflates primary/curated semantics; (B) URN-join in aggregation reads — adopted.

notes:
PR 1.2 of Arc 1 (URN reconcile arc, sequel to PR 1.1 d-2026-06-06-eb-urn-namespace-reconcile). Strategic position: named precursor to T5 voxel_groups gate per LUHTECH-EB-TIER1-ROS-OVERLAY-STRATEGY-2026-06-07 §8.T5. Closes the two remaining P1 T5 preconditions (aggregation half of voxelizer-level-extraction-fix, decisions-orphaned half of user-walk-voxel-wrong-levels) clean. Maple Ridge IFC source storey-name cleanup remains explicitly Arc 2 scope (separate L4 named-step) — Maple Ridge curated bundle v1.0.0 with explicit group definitions lands at T5 per DEC-010 Project Intake Pipeline.

Path B (URN-join in reads) chosen over Path A (auto-attach in intake) after Phase-2 substrate research across 16 files revealed the architectural distinction: pm_decisions.primary_voxel_urn = canonical spatial reference (one decision → one primary voxel, populated by Stage 6 intake); voxel_decision_attachments = curated/typed attachments with attachment_type semantics (populated by VoxelCoordinationService.routeAndAttachDecision via MCP tool attach_decision_to_voxel). These tables serve semantically distinct roles. Path A would conflate the two semantics; Path B respects the schema design intent and matches the SR PR #154 closure expectation (pd.primary_voxel_urn = v.urn).

Hard Constraint #1 (n8n integrity): this PR is a pure read-path change. NO migrations, NO DB writes, NO schema changes. n8n PostgreSQL pipeline (159.223.203.231) is untouched. Acquires no row locks during deploy.

Prerequisite chain: requires PR 1.1 (d-2026-06-06-eb-urn-namespace-reconcile, EB main f81f7b6b665f77eb4da9ae7afd8817de8b894d1e) merged + production-deployed first. PR 1.1 ensured voxels.urn and pm_decisions.primary_voxel_urn share canonical type-first shape; the join condition only works post-PR-1.1.

Cross-repo doctrine F0B85LNSTC4: this spec gets posted to Slack channel C0B7EPFCA85 with file SHA256 + bytes + validation status; SR-chat picks up from channel and lands SR anchor at schemas/_instances/deliverables/d-2026-06-08-eb-voxel-decision-aggregation-fix.json on luh-tech/schema-registry. EB-CLI tarball authoring follows AFTER SR anchor lands per memory #24.

Sibling surfaces enumerated but explicitly scope-locked OUT (9 new FUs filed in this PR): MCP-side aggregation paths (voxel.resolvers.ts + voxel-persistence.service.ts), in-memory voxel-decomposition.service.ts stale URN + aggregation, demo-persistence.service.ts broken UPDATE, legacy urn:ectropy emit sites across decision.resolvers/decomposition/mobile.routes/seed-demo-scenarios, tasks_routes.ts Type-2 missing-namespace URN, and voxels.decision_count denorm review.

Enterprise Excellence. Schema-First. No Shortcuts.
